summary: Phase 1 Pipeline Restructure - All 43 backend tests PASSED. Comprehensive testing of new pipeline stages, interview questionnaires, hard blocks, hold/resume mechanics, and employee segmentation completed successfully.
passed_tests: GET /api/interviews/criteria returns HR (10 items) and Manager (10 items) criteria arrays with key+label
POST /api/interviews/{lead_id}/hr - validates all 10 criteria present and within 1-5, computes avg_rating correctly
POST /api/interviews/{lead_id}/manager - rejects if lead.is_technician=true (only HO gets manager round)
GET /api/interviews/{lead_id} - returns both rounds (null if not submitted)
HO Pipeline: new_lead→qualified→hr_interview→manager_interview→move_ahead→joined - all transitions work
Technician Pipeline: new_lead→qualified→hr_interview→move_ahead→joined - all transitions work
Technician attempting to move to 'manager_interview' returns 400
HARD BLOCK: Moving lead to 'manager_interview' without HR questionnaire returns 400
HARD BLOCK: Moving HO lead to 'move_ahead' without Manager questionnaire returns 400
HARD BLOCK: Moving technician lead to 'move_ahead' without HR questionnaire returns 400
Moving to 'hold' requires hold_reason - missing returns 400
Moving to 'dead' requires dead_reason - missing returns 400
Hold stores previous_stage so lead can resume
Resume from hold to next stage works correctly
Interview records locked=true after lead reaches 'joined'
Interview records locked=true after lead reaches 'dead'
GET /api/employees/segments/summary returns correct structure with counts for branch.{technician,management}, head_office.{mid_level,management}
GET /api/employees/exited - returns 403 for Jr HR, Sr HR, Marketing Manager (non-CEO/HR roles)
GET /api/employees/exited - returns list for CEO, Super Admin, HR
POST /api/employees/convert/{lead_id} - requires lead stage in (move_ahead, joined, interview_cleared)
POST /api/employees/convert/{lead_id} - derives category/employment_type from lead.is_technician
POST /api/employees/{emp_id}/exit - returns 403 for Jr HR (non-super role)
POST /api/employees/{emp_id}/exit - marks employee status=left for CEO
GET /api/leads/pipeline-stats returns counts for all new stages
Skipping stages returns 400 with clear message
Legacy /api/leads CRUD still works
seed_data_creation: Test leads created with TEST_ prefix pattern for each test class
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 pipeline restructure is fully functional. All hard blocks for questionnaires work correctly. Hold/resume mechanics work. Interview locking on terminal states (joined/dead) works. Employee segmentation and exit endpoints work with proper role-based access control. WhatsApp 11za is STUBBED (logs only, does not call external API) - this is intentional for Phase 1.

mocked_apis.WhatsApp 11za: STUBBED - logs intent but does not call external API in Phase 1
